productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Solid Navy Blue Track Pant
description: Composition Navy blue trackpants made of 100% polyester, has a mesh inner lining, elasticated waist with a drawstring, two pockets on the sides, branding on the left pocket, and doggle straps at the hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or iron on print/logo Dry in shade Warm iron These trackpants from adidas are crafted from 100% polyester to offer comfort during strenuous training sessions. The mesh lining offers breathable comfort and helps combat excessive sweating. Pair it with sports shoes and a jersey to look your best while on the field, or simply wear it with t-shirts for a casual look.
